global.title: Iran activates air defences as Trump faces congressional deadline - Yahoo
global.summary: Middle East tensions continue to escalate as Iran activates air defences and global oil prices surge, with UN leaders warning of severe economic fallout and urging urgent dialogue.
global.whyItMatters: This shapes prayer, preaching, and pastoral care as families face anxiety over war, instability, and rising living costs.

global.title: April 30: High school stabbing, House explosion - NBC News
global.summary: NBC’s roundup highlights multiple fresh tragedies, including a high school stabbing in Washington state, officers injured in a house explosion, and a camp closure after fatal floods.
global.whyItMatters: Pastors are often helping people process fear, grief, and the sense that violence and disaster are always near.

global.title: Week Ahead for FX, Bonds: U.S. Jobs Data in Focus as Middle East Tensions Continue - WSJ
global.summary: Markets are entering a tense week with jobs data, central bank decisions, and ongoing Middle East instability all likely to affect currencies, bonds, and broader economic confidence.
global.whyItMatters: Economic uncertainty affects household stress, generosity, and the practical burdens people bring into church life.

canadian.title: Canada announces sovereign wealth fund, more major projects expected to move ahead within a year, and public input open for Webequie Supply Road project - Canadian Institute of Mining, Metallurgy and Petroleum (CIM)
canadian.summary: Canada is accelerating major resource and infrastructure projects, while B.C. has added 17 more developments to its priority list under its approval-fast-tracking plan.
canadian.whyItMatters: This affects stewardship, creation care, Indigenous relationships, and the economic hopes and tensions many congregants feel.

persecutedChurch.title: Nun is attacked in streets of Jerusalem, sparking outcry - NBC News
persecutedChurch.summary: A nun was violently shoved and kicked in Jerusalem in an attack police say was motivated by racism, renewing concern over repeated harassment of Christians in the city.
persecutedChurch.whyItMatters: This is a clear call to pray for vulnerable believers and to remember the cost of public Christian witness in some places.

persecutedChurch.title: Nearly Half of Germany's Jewish Communities Report Anti-semitic Incidents - Haaretz
persecutedChurch.summary: A new survey says nearly half of Germany’s Jewish communities reported antisemitic incidents over the past year, with leaders warning that hostility is becoming normalized in public life.
persecutedChurch.whyItMatters: Pastoral leadership includes resisting hatred, teaching human dignity, and standing with communities facing religious hostility.

leadership.title: Who Cares Wins: The Science Of Transformational Value Creation - Yahoo News Malaysia
leadership.summary: This leadership piece argues that cultures of care, trust, and empathy outperform compliance-driven models, offering practical ways to build resilient and engaged teams.
leadership.whyItMatters: It reinforces a deeply pastoral leadership instinct: people flourish where they are genuinely known, valued, and safe.

goodNews.title: King Charles III's charity celebrates 50 years of helping young people find work with a gala in NYC - WHEC.com
goodNews.summary: The King’s Trust marked 50 years of helping young people find work and direction, with testimonies showing how timely encouragement can change a life’s trajectory.
goodNews.whyItMatters: It is a hopeful reminder that patient investment in young people bears fruit and mirrors the church’s calling to mentor the next generation.
